headline: How Teradyne, Inc.’s (TER) Robotics Demos Keep Its Automation Story Grounded in Factory Use Cases
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the best industrial automation stocks to buy now. On June 18, Teradyne Robotics said it would showcase production-ready physical AI applications at Automate 2026, with demos spanning electronics manufacturing, logistics and flexible material handling. The story is relevant because it keeps the company’s automation case tied to deployable industrial […]
